title: Prostate Cancer Registry Data
description: Combined JSON Schema for all prostate cancer extraction signatures.

procedure.description: identify which surgery procedure was used. e.g. radical prostatectomy
procedure.title: Procedure

surgical_technique.description: identify how the surgery was taken. e.g. robotic
surgical_technique.title: Surgical Technique

prostate_weight.description: identify the weight of the prostate in grams. e.g. 50
prostate_weight.title: Prostate Weight

prostate_size.description: identify the size of the prostate in mm, largest dimension. e.g. 45 means 45mm
prostate_size.title: Prostate Size

histology.description: identify the histological type of the cancer. e.g. acinar adenocarcinoma
histology.title: Histology

grade.description: identify the gleason group of the cancer. e.g. group_2_3_4 means gleason score 7 (3+4)
grade.title: Grade

gleason_4_percentage.description: identify the percentage of gleason pattern 4. e.g. 20 means 20%
gleason_4_percentage.title: Gleason 4 Percentage

gleason_5_percentage.description: identify the percentage of gleason pattern 5. e.g. 0 means 0%
gleason_5_percentage.title: Gleason 5 Percentage

intraductal_carcinoma_presence.description: check whether or not intraductal carcinoma is present
intraductal_carcinoma_presence.title: Intraductal Carcinoma Presence

cribriform_pattern_presence.description: check whether or not cribriform pattern is present. only in gleason score 7 or 8
cribriform_pattern_presence.title: Cribriform Pattern Presence

tumor_percentage.description: identify the percentage of tumor in the prostate in both lobes. e.g. 30 means 30%
tumor_percentage.title: Tumor Percentage

tumor_size.description: identify the size of the tumor in mm, largest dimension. e.g. 15 means 15mm
tumor_size.title: Tumor Size

extraprostatic_extension.description: check whether or not extraprostatic extension is present
extraprostatic_extension.title: Extraprostatic Extension

seminal_vesicle_invasion.description: check whether or not seminal vesicle invasion is present
seminal_vesicle_invasion.title: Seminal Vesicle Invasion

bladder_invasion.description: check whether or not bladder invasion is present
bladder_invasion.title: Bladder Invasion

lymphovascular_invasion.description: check whether or not lymphovascular invasion is present
lymphovascular_invasion.title: Lymphovascular Invasion

perineural_invasion.description: check whether or not perineural invasion is present
perineural_invasion.title: Perineural Invasion

distant_metastasis.description: check whether or not distant metastasis is present
distant_metastasis.title: Distant Metastasis

treatment_effect.description: check the treatment effect of the cancer. If you see "No known presurgical therapy", return None
treatment_effect.title: Treatment Effect

tnm_descriptor.description: identify the tnm descriptor of the tumor. e.g., "y" (post-therapy), "r", etc.
tnm_descriptor.title: Tnm Descriptor

pt_category.description: identify the pt category of the tumor
pt_category.title: Pt Category

pn_category.description: identify the pn category of the tumor
pn_category.title: Pn Category

pm_category.description: identify the pm category of the tumor. if you see cM0 or cM1, etc., code as mx, since pathological M category is not available
pm_category.title: Pm Category

stage_group.description: identify the stage group of the tumor
stage_group.title: Stage Group

ajcc_version.description: identify the ajcc version of the pathological staging
ajcc_version.title: Ajcc Version

margin_positivity.description: check whether or not any margin is positive
margin_positivity.title: Margin Positivity

margin_length.description: if margin is positive, check whether the length of positive margin is limited (<3mm) or non-limited (>=3mm)
margin_length.title: Margin Length

regional_lymph_node.description: return all of the involved regional lymph node. If not present, just output null for every lymph node
regional_lymph_node.title: Regional Lymph Node

extranodal_extension.description: check whether or not extranodal extension is present; if no lymph node metastasis, should be None
extranodal_extension.title: Extranodal Extension

maximal_ln_size.description: check the maximal size of node metastatic tumor in mm, rounded to integer; if no lymph node metastasis, should be None
maximal_ln_size.title: Maximal Ln Size

lymph_node_side.description: acceptable value for lymph node side in prostate cancer. If not included in these standard sides, should be classified as None.
lymph_node_side.title: Lymph Node Side

lymph_node_category.description: acceptable value for lymph node categories (i.e. stations) in prostate cancer. If not included in these standard lymph node 'station' number, should be classified as others.
lymph_node_category.title: Lymph Node Category

station_name.description: specify the name of the lymph node group/station here.
station_name.title: Station Name
